title: Entitlements
body:
![A Minecraft-style Entitlements logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f1d6aefec29945ad7c61ed7696d67981e213853.png)

A Minecraft mod that displays your zones' names on-screen. 

![A screenshot of the mod's zone title screen showing that the player is entering a "Minecraft Village"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65f65e17c49459e56a13371924654cbe270b3ad.png)

## How to use

Craft a Copper Wrench with two ingots placed diagonally on the crafting table
Craft a Region Broadcaster, place it on ground, and then :
- Rename a name tag in an anvil to the zone name you want to be shown on-screen
- Right click with the tag on the block to apply the zone name
- Right click with the wrench anywhere to cycle between modes (default, radius and time)
- Right click with the wrench (in radius mode) to change the radius of the zone (the distance is calculated horizontally, that is, the Y axis (height) is not taken into account : this is useful for towers for example)
- Right click with the wrench (in display time mode) to change the title's display time.
And then, you are set !

## Recipe

![The recipe of the mod's main block : an ender pearl on top, a redstone lamp in the middle, and three copper ingots on the sides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da1f561cb79a392880823c6244376292d60cfe42.png)
